use_cases: Display a numeric value with interactive increment and decrement controls
Serve as a foundational interactive element for building more complex components
Demonstrate basic React useState hook usage with click handlers
ai_summary: A minimal atomic counter component featuring a numeric display and two buttons for incrementing and decrementing values. The component uses React useState for state management and basic Tailwind styling with flexbox layout. Originally labeled as a hero section but contains only a simple interactive counter demonstration.
